issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing environment variables or connection failures.
Uses curl|bash from official source without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Set up Drizzle ORM with Turso for users + posts with timestamps and relations
scenarios.rationale: Baseline picks the wrong adapter (better-sqlite3) and misses relations and timestamp mode; treatment uses drizzle-orm/libsql with @libsql/client, dialect:'turso' in drizzle.config.ts with authToken, sqliteTable columns with mode:'timestamp' + $defaultFn, and relations() for joins.

scenarios.name: Deploy a Cloudflare Worker that queries Turso with Drizzle
scenarios.rationale: Baseline imports the default @libsql/client (native bindings unsupported on Workers) and commits the token to wrangler.toml; treatment uses @libsql/client/http, creates the client per-request in middleware, and sets TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN via wrangler secret put.
